messages.author: bluebrolly.
messages.text: Currently there is a global on or off for the buzzer but that doesn’t give enough control over buzzer notifications. The public channel will have a lot of traffic and potentially useless messages, the buzzer will get annoying and you will want to have a buzzer triggered only for messages for a specific important channel or multiple channels. See attached video. I implemented in device firmware the ability to disable and enable notifications for each channel. The global buzzer_quiet is still there and is used as the primary flag. If buzzer is enabled then the per channel flag bits are used. The mobile app you see that looks new is my development app I use to test new settings that are not currently available in the main public android app. In the future I think we should have custom tones or melodies that we can assign per channel so when we aren’t looking at our phone or screen we can at least know via audio a message came in on which channel. I’ll post this on GitHub once I do a bit more testing and make sure it doesn’t cause any issues anywhere else
messages.content_html: Currently there is a global on or off for the buzzer but that doesn’t give enough control over buzzer notifications. The public channel will have a lot of traffic and potentially useless messages, the buzzer will get annoying and you will want to have a buzzer triggered only for messages for a specific important channel or multiple channels. See attached video. I implemented in device firmware the ability to disable and enable notifications for each channel. The global buzzer_quiet is still there and is used as the primary flag. If buzzer is enabled then the per channel flag bits are used. The mobile app you see that looks new is my development app I use to test new settings that are not currently available in the main public android app. In the future I think we should have custom tones or melodies that we can assign per channel so when we aren’t looking at our phone or screen we can at least know via audio a message came in on which channel. I’ll post this on GitHub once I do a bit more testing and make sure it doesn’t cause any issues anywhere else

messages.text: My implementation of it was turned down by the devs.
